last_verdict.note: Logic suite green on the desktop (i9-13980HX). +4 vs prior count from new FIFO/_audio_cb tests landed this session. 2 pre-existing numpy divide-by-zero RuntimeWarnings in core/endpointing.py (mel filter), not failures. Whole-tree import smoke also PASS (120 modules).

next: DONE: recovered + landed the PC-interrupted playback rewrite on main (554b300) -- TTS now flows through a callback-driven OutputStream + bounded PlaybackFIFO so the AEC far-end reference is teed from the audio callback at the TRUE playback position (far->near lag now inside DTLN's +/-60ms tolerance); barge-in/shutdown flush the FIFO instead of abort(). Ran an adversarial review before landing (6 minor findings, 0 blockers) and hardened: honest abort/flush contract (a true rollback is unsound under concurrent flush/drain -- abort MUST be paired with flush()), direct device-free _audio_cb tests, pinned the notify wake-path, fixed a vacuous assertion. NEXT (P1, needs the mic): AEC on-hardware -- enable aec in config.local.json, calibrate aec_ref_delay_ms + measure post-AEC ERLE with tools/echo_probe.py now that the far-end ref is properly aligned; then Smart Turn v3 live floor A/B.
